Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1091}Welcome! Take any open seat.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Sorry for asking you to go out all of a sudden.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I just wanted someone to come with me. It's a little intimidating going to get food by myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}People tend to stare when they see an elementary school kid like me out on his own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1091}Two specials, comin' right up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Seems like that's the thing to get, huh. Thanks for ordering.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1091}Two regulars, comin' right up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Hm, looks like there's a special ramen too. I wonder if that's what most people get.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1091}Err, sorry, we don't have that here...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I-I'm fine with the regular! I can totally eat that much![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}That was mean, {f 4 1}-san... Please don't treat me like a kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}...So I saw some people from our dorm stop by here a while back.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Like Sanada-san, and that guy who recently joined... Aragaki-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Do you come here with them too, {f 4 1}-san? What kinds of things do you talk about?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...Oh, sorry for asking something so weird.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I just thought I should know a bit more about everyone, since we'll be fighting together from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}But it's good either way, 'cause I've always wanted to have a proper chat with you, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Everyone in the dorm is amazing, but you're on a completely different level.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I can't believe how many Personas you're able to use![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Ikutsuki-san and Mitsuru-san said that each person normally has only one Persona, and that it doesn't change.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 3 25 25}That means, what I saw back then was really...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}...Uh, it's nothing! Sorry. Shall we eat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Whew, I finished all the soup too. I'm stuffed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Phoenix Ranger Featherman R: The Melancholy of Swallow will air this winter as a TV special![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 1 25 25}Wow, a spin-off with Swallow as the main character! I gotta make sure I record that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Yeah, I watch it every week without fail! But this TV special is big news![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Swallow doesn't usually make much of an impression, but there's a theory that he's actually stronger than Hawk![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}They just announced a TV special for an ongoing superhero series![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}And it's with Feather Swallow. Out of the five members, he's the one you'd least expect![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}Swallow doesn't usually make much of an impression, but there's a theory that he's actually stronger than Hawk![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}I, uh... heard that from a friend. TV shows like that seem to be popular in my class.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I only watch them so I have something to talk about... Haha.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Anyway, it's been a while since I've enjoyed a meal like this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}I guess it's because I'm eating with you, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}{f 4 23 0 8 0 25 25}You're really easy to talk to, and the ramen was delicious. Maybe next time we can—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}It's getting late. We should start heading back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}...No. This food was not delicious.[n]{f 1 1}
